keywords.name: Agile
keywords.description: When a battle with one of your spirits that costs less than this card ends, you may return that spirit to your hand. If you do, you may summon this spirit.

keywords.name: Armor
keywords.description: This spirit cannot be selected by the effects of your opponent's spirits, nexuses, or magic of the specified colors.

keywords.name: Ascend
keywords.description: As an additional summoning cost, you must place all cores from one of your spirits into your reserve.

keywords.name: Astral
keywords.description: This spirit cannot be blocked by your opponent's spirits without "Astral".

keywords.name: A.T. Field
keywords.description: If this spirit has a "soul core" on it, it cannot be destroyed by the destruction effects of your opponent's spirits.

keywords.name: Awaken
keywords.description: You may remove any number of cores from your other spirits and place them onto this spirit. "When Destroyed" effects are not triggered by this effect.

keywords.name: Blessed
keywords.description: Place a core from the void into your life when this spirit's attack reduces your opponent's life.

keywords.name: Bloodcurse
keywords.description: When one of your spirits with "Curse" or "Bloodcurse" reduces your opponent's life, place the lost life cores into the void instead of their reserve.

keywords.name: Burst
keywords.description: Place this card without paying its cost.

keywords.name: Confront
keywords.description: Your opponent must block if able.

keywords.name: Curse
keywords.description: If one of your opponent's spirits blocks, destroy it when the battle ends.

keywords.name: Crush
keywords.description: Discard a number of cards from the top of your opponent's deck equal to the total of this spirit's level plus any specified modifier.

keywords.name: Gale
keywords.description: When this spirit is blocked, your opponent selects the specified number of refreshed spirits they control and exhausts them.

keywords.name: Immortal
keywords.description: You may summon this spirit card from your trash when one of your other spirits of the specified cost is destroyed.

keywords.name: Link
keywords.description: When your qualifying spirit attacks, you may exhaust this spirit to link it to that spirit during this battle. While linked, that spirit gains this spirit's BP and symbols. Links can't stack.

keywords.name: Luster
keywords.description: When the battle ends, return all magic cards you used during the battle from your trash to your hand

keywords.name: Raid
keywords.description: Up to the specified number of times per turn, you may exhaust one of your nexuses to refresh this spirit.

keywords.name: Swift
keywords.description: You may summon this card from your hand by using cores from your reserve to pay its cost and place cores onto it.
